raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu Zilweka Behrns/ wat-
i pahr to Egiptes Draudsi/ un
ai winna lihds ar to lepnu Pa-
anu Meitahm nogrimst us
tahm leijs Weetahm tahs Sem-
nes/ pee teem/ kas Dsitturna
rr grimmuschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pahr kurren effi tu nu
kaistaka? kahp femme/ un ap-
gullees pee teem Ne-apgraisi-
teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee krittihs starp teem ar
Sehbina Nokanteem. Winna
irr Sohbinam nodohta/ norau-
jeet winnu ar wiſſu winnas
Draudsi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee Warreni starp teem
Warreneem runnahs ar winnu
Elles Widdû/ ar winnas Pali-
geein/ tee irr nogrimmuschi/ tee
gull starp teem Ne-apgraisiteem/
un ar Sehbina Nokanteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tur irr Affurs ar wiſſu
fawu Draudsi/ winna Kappi irr
apkahrt winnu/ tee irr wiſſi no-
kauti zaur Sohbinu krittutchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kurxa Kappi irr fahnis
to Bedri/ un winna Draudse irr
wiſſapkahrt fawu Kappu/ tee irr
wiſſi nokanti zaur Sohbinu krit-
tuschi/ kas to Semmi to Dsih-
wu tstruhzinaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tur irr Elains ar wiſſu
fawn Draudsi apkahrt winnas
Kappu/ tee wiſſi irr nokauti zaur
Sohbina krittuschi/ kas ne ap-
graisiti irr us tahm leijs Wee-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Starp teem Nokanteem
irr winnai Ziffas padarritas/ ar
wiſſu winnas Draudsi/ winnas
Kappi irr apkahrt winnu/ tee
wiſſi irr Ne-apgraisiti/ zaur
Sohbinu Nokauti/ tapehz ka no
teem ta Semmie to Dsihwu tap-
pe istrubzinata/ nu neſs tee fa-
wn Kaunu ar teem/ kas Dsitturna
ma nogrimmuschi/ winsch irr to
Nokauto Widdû likts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tur irr Meeseks un Tuh-
bals ar wiſſu fawu Draudsi/ ap-
kaht winnu irr winnas Kappi/
tee wiſſi irr ne-apgraisiti un no-
kauti ar Sohbina/ tapehz ka tee
to Semmi to Dsihwu bij istrub-
zinajzchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne buhtu tee gullesfchi
starp teem Warrenneem/ kas ar
teem Ne-apgraisiteem irr krittut-
chi/ kas Elle irr nogrimmuschi
ar fawahn Brunnahn/un Soh-
bini irr likti appatsch winnu
Galwahn/ un kurru Noseegums
irr pahr winnu Kauleem nahzis/
tapehz ka to Warrenu Istruhzi-
natchana irr tai Semme to Dsih-
wu bijusi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir tu tapſi fatreeks to
Ne-apgraisito Widdû/ un gul-
leti pee teem zaur Sohbinu No-
kanteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tur irr Eedoms/ winna
Kehnizi un wiſſi winna Leel-
Run-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
